sections.title: Attempting to enter the nearby cave before completing Children of the Sun

lines.speaker: Border Guard
lines.text: Sorry, traveller, but you don't have permission to enter the Kingdom of Varlamore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just wondering what brings you out here?

lines.speaker: Border Guard
lines.text: This is the only land border into the Kingdom of Varlamore. We're here to make sure no one enters without permission.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Would I be able to enter?

lines.speaker: Border Guard
lines.text: No. The Queen is currently making arrangements to allow outsiders like yourself to enter Varlamore without needing to obtain permission first. However, until then, you must remain on this side of the border.

lines.speaker: Border Guard
lines.text: Well, arrangements have now been made to allow outsiders like yourself to enter Varlamore. However, this is an inhospitable route into the kingdom. I'd suggest you find an alternate way to travel.
